question: 查询所有华为厂商的PE设备，要求运行状态正常。
implicit_knowledge: 华为→vendor='HUAWEI'；PE设备→role='PE'；运行状态正常→oper_status='UP'

question: 统计每个大区有多少个TIER1级别的站点。
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS tier1_count
FROM t_site
WHERE tier = 'TIER1'
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY tier1_count DESC;

question: 当前有多少条SRv6 Policy处于DOWN状态？
implicit_knowledge: SRv6 Policy→t_srv6_policy表

question: 查询北京市所有网元的名称、型号和所在站点名称。
implicit_knowledge: 地理过滤在t_site上，需JOIN
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ne.model, ne.role, s.site_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE s.city = '北京';

question: 哪些设备的100GE物理端口数量超过10个？
implicit_knowledge: 100GE物理端口→phy_type='100GE' AND if_type='PHYSICAL'
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ne.model, COUNT(*) AS port_100ge_count
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
WHERE i.phy_type = '100GE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name, ne.model
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY port_100ge_count DESC;

question: 查询使用SRv6 TE承载的所有L3VPN业务及其关联的PE设备名称。
implicit_knowledge: SRv6 TE承载→underlay_type='SRV6_TE'；需经过vpn_pe_binding桥接表
expected_sql:
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.service_level,
       ne.ne_name AS pe_name, ne.management_ip
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE v.underlay_type = 'SRV6_TE' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE';

question: 查询过去24小时CPU平均利用率超过80%的网元。
implicit_knowledge: 时间范围理解；OLTP+OLAP JOIN
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ne.model, ne.role,
       AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
       MAX(k.cpu_usage_max_pct) AS peak_cpu
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name, ne.model, ne.role
HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80
ORDER BY avg_cpu DESC;

question: 找出GOLD级别VPN业务中，隧道实测时延超过SLA要求的记录。
implicit_knowledge: 需关联VPN→隧道→隧道KPI；SLA阈值在t_l3vpn_service.max_latency_ms上
expected_sql:
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_limit,
       t.tunnel_name, tp.latency_avg_ms AS actual_latency,
       ne_s.ne_name AS source, ne_d.ne_name AS dest
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tp ON t.tunnel_id = tp.tunnel_id
JOIN t_network_element ne_s ON t.source_ne_id = ne_s.ne_id
JOIN t_network_element ne_d ON t.dest_ne_id = ne_d.ne_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND tp.collect_time = (SELECT MAX(collect_time) FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi WHERE tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id)
  AND tp.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms;

question: 统计每台PE设备上所有物理接口的带宽利用率分布（空闲<30%/正常30-70%/繁忙70-90%/过载>90%），只看最新一个采集周期。
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS t FROM t_interface_perf_kpi)
SELECT ne.ne_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30 THEN 1 END) AS idle,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 30 AND 70 THEN 1 END) AS normal,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 70 AND 90 THEN 1 END) AS busy,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90 THEN 1 END) AS overload
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE k.collect_time = l.t AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY overload DESC;

question: 查看过去7天华北区域PE设备的每日平均CPU利用率趋势及环比变化。
implicit_knowledge: 华北区域→region='华北'
expected_sql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT DATE(k.collect_time) AS day, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE s.region = '华北' AND ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY DATE(k.collect_time)
)
SELECT day, ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu,
       ROUND(avg_cpu - LAG(avg_cpu) OVER (ORDER BY day), 2) AS change
FROM daily ORDER BY day;

question: 找出SLA违规率最高的前5个VPN客户，统计每个客户的VPN数量、总违规次数和违规率（最近30天）。
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count,
    COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violations
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
)
SELECT customer_name, vpn_count, violations, total_samples,
  ROUND(violations * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_samples, 0), 2) AS violation_rate_pct
FROM stats WHERE total_samples > 0
ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 找出所有'单点故障'链路——两个站点之间只有一条物理链路、且该链路承载了GOLD级别VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 单点故障需推断为站点间链路数=1；链路→NE→VPN的间接关联
expected_sql:
WITH site_pair AS (
  SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s1,
         GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s2,
         COUNT(*) AS link_cnt, ARRAY_AGG(link_id) AS links
  FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'
  GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id)
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
gold_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT pl.link_id
  FROM t_physical_link pl
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON b.ne_id = pl.a_ne_id
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD','PLATINUM') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
)
SELECT pl.link_name, sa.site_name AS site_a, sz.site_name AS site_b,
       pl.bandwidth_mbps, pl.distance_km
FROM site_pair sp
JOIN t_physical_link pl ON pl.link_id = ANY(sp.links)
JOIN t_site sa ON sp.s1 = sa.site_id
JOIN t_site sz ON sp.s2 = sz.site_id
WHERE pl.link_id IN (SELECT link_id FROM gold_links);

question: 哪些PE已经使能了SRv6但还没有创建任何SRv6 Policy？
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ne.model, ne.srv6_locator
FROM t_network_element ne
WHERE ne.srv6_enabled = TRUE AND ne.role = 'PE'
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_srv6_policy sp WHERE sp.source_ne_id = ne.ne_id);

question: 对比上周和本周各站点平均接口带宽利用率，找出增长超过20个百分点的站点。
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS wk,
    AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_name,
  ROUND(lw.avg_bw, 2) AS last_week, ROUND(tw.avg_bw, 2) AS this_week,
  ROUND(tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw, 2) AS increase
FROM weekly tw JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id
WHERE tw.wk = 'THIS' AND lw.wk = 'LAST' AND (tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw) > 20
ORDER BY increase DESC;

question: 为每条GOLD级VPN业务计算健康评分（时延达标+25分，抖动达标+25分，丢包达标+25分，可用率达标+25分），输出评分低于75分的业务。
implicit_knowledge: 见题目对应字段与表关系
expected_sql:
WITH health AS (
  SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_latency_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_jitter_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_availability_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS score,
    AVG(sk.e2e_latency_avg_ms) AS lat, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS loss,
    AVG(sk.availability_pct) AS avail
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
  GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
)
SELECT vpn_name, customer_name, ROUND(score, 1) AS health_score,
  ROUND(lat, 2) AS avg_latency_ms, ROUND(loss, 4) AS avg_loss_pct,
  ROUND(avail, 2) AS availability_pct
FROM health WHERE score < 75 ORDER BY score;

question: 查询所有处于ACTIVE状态且合同将在90天内到期的站点。
implicit_knowledge: 90天内到期→contract_expire_date 在当前日期到未来90天之间；ACTIVE状态看 t_site.status
expected_sql:
SELECT site_id, site_name, region, city, contract_expire_date
FROM t_site
WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND contract_expire_date IS NOT NULL
  AND contract_expire_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days'
ORDER BY contract_expire_date;

question: 统计各厂商在网PE设备数量。
implicit_knowledge: 在网PE设备→role=PE 且 oper_status=UP；按vendor聚合
expected_sql:
SELECT vendor, COUNT(*) AS pe_count
FROM t_network_element
WHERE role = 'PE' AND oper_status = 'UP'
GROUP BY vendor
ORDER BY pe_count DESC, vendor;

question: 查询所有管理状态DOWN但运行状态UP的网元。
implicit_knowledge: admin_status 和 oper_status 不是同一概念：前者是人工配置，后者是系统检测
expected_sql:
SELECT ne_id, ne_name, vendor, role, admin_status, oper_status
FROM t_network_element
WHERE admin_status = 'DOWN' AND oper_status = 'UP'
ORDER BY ne_name;

question: 列出所有Loopback接口及其所属设备。
implicit_knowledge: Loopback接口→t_interface.if_type=LOOPBACK；设备名称要关联 t_network_element
expected_sql:
SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, i.ipv4_address, i.ipv6_address, ne.ne_name
FROM t_interface i
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE i.if_type = 'LOOPBACK'
ORDER BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name;

question: 查询所有400GE物理接口且运行状态为UP的端口。
implicit_knowledge: 400GE物理接口→phy_type=400GE 且 if_type=PHYSICAL；端口运行状态看接口表 oper_status
expected_sql:
SELECT if_id, if_name, ne_id, speed_mbps, description
FROM t_interface
WHERE if_type = 'PHYSICAL' AND phy_type = '400GE' AND oper_status = 'UP'
ORDER BY ne_id, if_name;

question: 查询所有已启用NETCONF和Telemetry的设备。
implicit_knowledge: 自动化友好设备→netconf_enabled=TRUE 且 telemetry_enabled=TRUE
expected_sql:
SELECT ne_id, ne_name, vendor, model, management_ip
FROM t_network_element
WHERE netconf_enabled = TRUE AND telemetry_enabled = TRUE
ORDER BY vendor, ne_name;

question: 查询所有板卡类型为MPU且运行状态FAULT的单板。
implicit_knowledge: MPU→主控板；故障单板看 t_board.oper_status=FAULT
expected_sql:
SELECT b.board_id, b.ne_id, b.slot_number, b.board_name, b.oper_status
FROM t_board b
WHERE b.board_type = 'MPU' AND b.oper_status = 'FAULT'
ORDER BY b.ne_id, b.slot_number;

question: 统计每种接口类型的数量。
implicit_knowledge: 接口类型是逻辑类型 if_type，不是物理速率 phy_type
expected_sql:
SELECT if_type, COUNT(*) AS if_count
FROM t_interface
GROUP BY if_type
ORDER BY if_count DESC, if_type;

question: 查询所有未启用MPLS但角色为P的设备。
implicit_knowledge: P设备通常应参与骨干转发；题目显式检查 mpls_enabled=FALSE 且 role=P
expected_sql:
SELECT ne_id, ne_name, vendor, model, mpls_enabled
FROM t_network_element
WHERE role = 'P' AND COALESCE(mpls_enabled, FALSE) = FALSE
ORDER BY ne_name;

question: 查询所有服务等级为PLATINUM且已启用加密的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 加密VPN→encryption_enabled=TRUE；PLATINUM 是 service_level 的枚举值
expected_sql:
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, bandwidth_mbps, underlay_type
FROM t_l3vpn_service
WHERE service_level = 'PLATINUM' AND encryption_enabled = TRUE
ORDER BY customer_name, vpn_name;

question: 查询每个城市当前在网PE设备数量。
implicit_knowledge: 在网PE设备→role=PE 且 oper_status=UP；城市来自站点表
expected_sql:
SELECT s.city, COUNT(*) AS pe_count
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND ne.oper_status = 'UP'
GROUP BY s.city
ORDER BY pe_count DESC, s.city;

question: 找出每个设备上端口数量最多的单板。
implicit_knowledge: 每台设备内取 t_board.port_count 最大的板卡
expected_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT b.ne_id, b.board_id, b.slot_number, b.board_name, b.port_count,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.ne_id ORDER BY b.port_count DESC NULLS LAST, b.board_id) AS rn
  FROM t_board b
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, r.board_id, r.slot_number, r.board_name, r.port_count
FROM ranked r
JOIN t_network_element ne ON r.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE r.rn = 1
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

question: 查询所有站内链路中带宽大于等于100000 Mbps的链路。
implicit_knowledge: 站内链路→is_intra_site=TRUE；100000 Mbps 对应 100GE 量级容量
expected_sql:
SELECT link_id, link_name, a_site_id, z_site_id, bandwidth_mbps, link_type
FROM t_physical_link
WHERE is_intra_site = TRUE AND bandwidth_mbps >= 100000
ORDER BY bandwidth_mbps DESC, link_id;

question: 统计每个VPN客户绑定了多少台不同的PE设备。
implicit_knowledge: PE数量不能只看 pe_count 字段，应通过绑定表对 ne_id 去重统计
expected_sql:
SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT b.ne_id) AS pe_device_count
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
ORDER BY pe_device_count DESC, v.customer_name;

question: 查询使用EBGP接入且接入带宽大于1000 Mbps的VPN接入绑定。
implicit_knowledge: EBGP接入看 binding.routing_protocol；接入带宽在 access_bandwidth_mbps
expected_sql:
SELECT b.binding_id, v.vpn_name, ne.ne_name, b.if_id, b.access_bandwidth_mbps, b.ce_as_number
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE b.routing_protocol = 'EBGP' AND b.access_bandwidth_mbps > 1000
ORDER BY b.access_bandwidth_mbps DESC, b.binding_id;

question: 找出配置了SRv6 Locator但SRv6未启用的设备。
implicit_knowledge: 配置存在不代表功能启用；需同时检查 srv6_locator 非空 且 srv6_enabled=FALSE
expected_sql:
SELECT ne_id, ne_name, vendor, srv6_locator, srv6_enabled
FROM t_network_element
WHERE srv6_locator IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(srv6_enabled, FALSE) = FALSE
ORDER BY ne_name;

question: 查询所有使用MPLS_TE承载且当前运行状态为UP的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 承载技术取自 underlay_type；业务运行状态取 oper_status
expected_sql:
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, service_level, bandwidth_mbps
FROM t_l3vpn_service
WHERE underlay_type = 'MPLS_TE' AND oper_status = 'UP'
ORDER BY customer_name, vpn_name;

question: 统计每台设备的物理接口数和Loopback接口数。
implicit_knowledge: 接口统计按逻辑类型分桶：PHYSICAL 与 LOOPBACK
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL' THEN 1 END) AS physical_if_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN i.if_type = 'LOOPBACK' THEN 1 END) AS loopback_if_count
FROM t_network_element ne
LEFT JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

question: 查询所有合同已过期但仍处于ACTIVE状态的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 合同已过期→contract_end_date < CURRENT_DATE；业务仍在服务中看 admin_status=ACTIVE
expected_sql:
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, contract_end_date, admin_status
FROM t_l3vpn_service
WHERE admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND contract_end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND contract_end_date < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY contract_end_date;

question: 查看每个PE设备上绑定的VRF实例数量。
implicit_knowledge: PE上的VRF通过绑定表与VRF表关联，避免直接依赖设备表字段
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, COUNT(DISTINCT b.vrf_id) AS vrf_count
FROM t_network_element ne
LEFT JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON ne.ne_id = b.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY vrf_count DESC, ne.ne_name;

question: 找出每个站点机柜利用率超过80%的站点。
implicit_knowledge: 机柜利用率是派生指标：used_rack_count / total_rack_count × 100；需防止除零
expected_sql:
SELECT site_id, site_name, city,
       ROUND(used_rack_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_rack_count, 0), 2) AS rack_util_pct
FROM t_site
WHERE total_rack_count IS NOT NULL AND total_rack_count > 0
  AND used_rack_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_rack_count, 0) > 80
ORDER BY rack_util_pct DESC, site_name;

question: 查询所有显式路径SRv6 Policy中，SLA目标为LOW_LATENCY且最大时延约束小于10ms的策略。
implicit_knowledge: 显式路径策略→explicit_path=TRUE；低时延意图在 sla_type=LOW_LATENCY
expected_sql:
SELECT policy_id, policy_name, source_ne_id, dest_ne_id, max_latency_ms, preference
FROM t_srv6_policy
WHERE explicit_path = TRUE
  AND sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'
  AND max_latency_ms < 10
ORDER BY max_latency_ms, preference DESC;

question: 查询最近7天内有路径切换的SRv6 Policy。
implicit_knowledge: 路径变化时间在 last_path_change；最近7天按时间过滤
expected_sql:
SELECT policy_id, policy_name, source_ne_id, dest_ne_id, last_path_change
FROM t_srv6_policy
WHERE last_path_change >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY last_path_change DESC;

question: 统计每个隧道类型的隧道数量和平均配置带宽。
implicit_knowledge: 配置带宽看 t_tunnel.bandwidth_mbps，不是实测吞吐
expected_sql:
SELECT tunnel_type,
       COUNT(*) AS tunnel_count,
       ROUND(AVG(bandwidth_mbps), 2) AS avg_bandwidth_mbps
FROM t_tunnel
GROUP BY tunnel_type
ORDER BY tunnel_count DESC, tunnel_type;

question: 查询所有运行状态UP但最新KPI中采样状态为DOWN的接口。
implicit_knowledge: 运行状态不一致：基础表 t_interface.oper_status 与最新 KPI 快照对比
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT if_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY if_id
)
SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, ne.ne_name, i.oper_status AS inventory_oper_status, k.oper_status AS kpi_oper_status
FROM latest l
JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi k ON l.if_id = k.if_id AND l.max_time = k.collect_time
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND k.oper_status = 'DOWN'
ORDER BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name;

question: 查询过去24小时平均CPU利用率排名前10的PE设备，并同时返回平均内存利用率。
implicit_knowledge: 排名对象是PE设备；CPU和内存都来自 t_ne_perf_kpi；过去24小时按设备聚合后排序
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       ROUND(AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_cpu_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_mem_pct
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY avg_cpu_pct DESC, ne.ne_name
LIMIT 10;

question: 找出最近7天内BGP对等体可用率低于80%的设备。
implicit_knowledge: BGP对等体可用率=bgp_peer_up_count / bgp_peer_total_count × 100；按设备和时间窗聚合
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       ROUND(AVG(k.bgp_peer_up_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(k.bgp_peer_total_count, 0)), 2) AS bgp_peer_up_ratio_pct
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND k.bgp_peer_total_count > 0
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
HAVING AVG(k.bgp_peer_up_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(k.bgp_peer_total_count, 0)) < 80
ORDER BY bgp_peer_up_ratio_pct, ne.ne_name;

question: 统计最近24小时每个区域的关键告警压力：按区域汇总critical+major告警平均值。
implicit_knowledge: 告警压力没有现成字段，需要用设备KPI中的 alarm_critical_count + alarm_major_count 派生；区域来自站点
expected_sql:
SELECT s.region,
       ROUND(AVG(k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count), 2) AS avg_alarm_pressure
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY s.region
ORDER BY avg_alarm_pressure DESC, s.region;

question: 查询最新一个采集周期中入方向带宽利用率和出方向带宽利用率都超过70%的接口。
implicit_knowledge: 双高利用接口→in_bandwidth_usage_pct>70 AND out_bandwidth_usage_pct>70；最新周期先取接口KPI最大时间
expected_sql:
WITH latest_time AS (
  SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS max_time FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name, k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN latest_time lt ON k.collect_time = lt.max_time
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct > 70 AND k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 70
ORDER BY k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct DESC, k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct DESC;

question: 找出最近7天发生CRC错误最多的前5个物理接口。
implicit_knowledge: CRC错误在接口KPI表；物理接口需关联接口表过滤 if_type=PHYSICAL
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name, SUM(k.crc_error_count) AS crc_errors_7d
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name
ORDER BY crc_errors_7d DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name
LIMIT 5;

question: 找出最近7天平均温度超过阈值的单板所属设备。
implicit_knowledge: 单板温度阈值在 t_board.temperature_threshold，但观测温度只能从设备KPI温度近似映射到所属设备层
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       ROUND(AVG(k.temperature_avg_c), 2) AS avg_temp_c,
       MAX(b.temperature_threshold) AS board_temp_threshold
FROM t_board b
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id
WHERE b.temperature_threshold IS NOT NULL
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
HAVING AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) > MAX(b.temperature_threshold)
ORDER BY avg_temp_c DESC;

question: 查询最近30天内合同即将到期（30天内）且月租费排名前10的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 高价值续约风险业务=合同30天内到期 + monthly_fee高；按月租费排序取Top10
expected_sql:
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, monthly_fee, contract_end_date
FROM t_l3vpn_service
WHERE contract_end_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, contract_end_date
LIMIT 10;

question: 找出每个客户中带宽最大的那条VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 每个客户内部 Top1 业务；以 SLA 保证带宽 bandwidth_mbps 作为业务规模代理
expected_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, bandwidth_mbps,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY bandwidth_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM t_l3vpn_service
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, bandwidth_mbps
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY bandwidth_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

question: 查询所有Hub-Spoke拓扑中担任HUB角色的PE，以及其承载的VPN数量。
implicit_knowledge: HUB角色不在设备表，而在绑定表的 pe_role=HUB；承载VPN数量按绑定记录去重统计
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, COUNT(DISTINCT b.vpn_id) AS hub_vpn_count
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE v.topology = 'HUB_SPOKE' AND b.pe_role = 'HUB'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY hub_vpn_count DESC, ne.ne_name;

question: 统计每个VRF实例的路由利用率，并找出超过80%的VRF。
implicit_knowledge: VRF路由利用率= current_route_count / max_routes × 100；字段都在 VRF 表中
expected_sql:
SELECT vrf_id, vrf_name, ne_id,
       ROUND(current_route_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(max_routes, 0), 2) AS route_util_pct
FROM t_vrf_instance
WHERE max_routes IS NOT NULL AND max_routes > 0
  AND current_route_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(max_routes, 0) > 80
ORDER BY route_util_pct DESC, vrf_name;

question: 找出所有启用了BFD但最近24小时接口状态翻转次数超过3次的接口。
implicit_knowledge: BFD启用在接口表；抖动接口用最近24小时 status_change_count 累加判断
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name, SUM(k.status_change_count) AS flap_count_24h
FROM t_interface i
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi k ON i.if_id = k.if_id
WHERE i.bfd_enabled = TRUE
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name
HAVING SUM(k.status_change_count) > 3
ORDER BY flap_count_24h DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name;

question: 查询最近7天每条隧道的平均时延、平均抖动，并按平均时延降序排序。
implicit_knowledge: 隧道质量统计来自 t_tunnel_perf_kpi；过去7天按 tunnel_id 聚合
expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       ROUND(AVG(k.latency_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
       ROUND(AVG(k.jitter_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_jitter_ms
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC, t.tunnel_name;

question: 找出最新SLA指标已不达标，但四个子项中只有时延不达标的VPN。
implicit_knowledge: 综合不达标且仅时延不达标→sla_overall_met=FALSE, sla_latency_met=FALSE，其余三个子项均为TRUE；最新样本按VPN取最新 collect_time
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.e2e_latency_avg_ms, v.max_latency_ms
FROM latest l
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi s ON l.vpn_id = s.vpn_id AND l.max_time = s.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.sla_overall_met = FALSE
  AND s.sla_latency_met = FALSE
  AND s.sla_jitter_met = TRUE
  AND s.sla_loss_met = TRUE
  AND s.sla_availability_met = TRUE
ORDER BY s.e2e_latency_avg_ms DESC, v.vpn_name;

question: 统计每个区域近7天平均CPU利用率最高的前三台设备。
implicit_knowledge: 区域内Top3设备，需要先按设备聚合，再做分区排名
expected_sql:
WITH device_avg AS (
  SELECT s.region, ne.ne_name, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY s.region, ne.ne_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT region, ne_name, avg_cpu,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY avg_cpu DESC, ne_name) AS rn
  FROM device_avg
)
SELECT region, ne_name, ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY region, rn;

question: 找出同一客户名下同时使用SRV6_TE和MPLS_TE两种承载方式的客户。
implicit_knowledge: 同一客户多承载策略是组合概念，需要对 underlay_type 做条件聚合
expected_sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name
FROM t_l3vpn_service
GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN underlay_type IN ('SRV6_TE', 'MPLS_TE') THEN underlay_type END) = 2
ORDER BY customer_name;

question: 查询每个PE设备最近24小时平均接口出方向带宽利用率。
implicit_knowledge: PE设备接口利用率通过接口KPI按设备聚合；默认看出方向 out_bandwidth_usage_pct
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ROUND(AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct), 2) AS avg_out_bw_pct
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY avg_out_bw_pct DESC, ne.ne_name;

question: 找出最近7天平均丢包率超过其SLA上限的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: SLA上限取 t_l3vpn_service.max_packet_loss_pct；实际值取 t_vpn_sla_kpi.e2e_packet_loss_pct 的7天平均
expected_sql:
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct), 4) AS avg_loss_pct,
       v.max_packet_loss_pct AS sla_loss_pct
FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_packet_loss_pct
HAVING AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct) > v.max_packet_loss_pct
ORDER BY avg_loss_pct DESC, v.vpn_name;

question: 找出没有任何接入绑定记录的ACTIVE VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 没有接入绑定=在 t_vpn_pe_binding 中不存在 vpn_id 记录；是 anti-join 场景
expected_sql:
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b WHERE b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  )
ORDER BY v.customer_name, v.vpn_name;

question: 查询所有配置了Tunnel Policy但没有配置RT导入导出的VRF实例。
implicit_knowledge: VRF配置缺失检查：tunnel_policy 非空，但 vpn_target_import 或 vpn_target_export 为空
expected_sql:
SELECT vrf_id, vrf_name, ne_id, tunnel_policy, vpn_target_import, vpn_target_export
FROM t_vrf_instance
WHERE tunnel_policy IS NOT NULL
  AND (vpn_target_import IS NULL OR vpn_target_export IS NULL)
ORDER BY vrf_name;

question: 查询每个厂商最近7天设备平均内存利用率，并按从高到低排序。
implicit_knowledge: 设备健康按厂商聚合；指标取 t_ne_perf_kpi.memory_usage_avg_pct
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.vendor, ROUND(AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_mem_pct
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.vendor
ORDER BY avg_mem_pct DESC, ne.vendor;

question: 查询最近30天每个客户的SLA达标率，并只保留达标率低于95%的客户。
implicit_knowledge: 达标率= sla_overall_met=TRUE 的样本数 / 总样本数；客户维度需通过 VPN 表映射
expected_sql:
WITH customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
         COUNT(*) AS total_samples,
         SUM(CASE WHEN s.sla_overall_met THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_samples
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name,
       ROUND(met_samples * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_samples, 0), 2) AS sla_hit_rate_pct,
       total_samples
FROM customer_sla
WHERE met_samples * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_samples, 0) < 95
ORDER BY sla_hit_rate_pct, customer_name;

question: 找出最近7天中每天都有SLA违规样本的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 每天都有SLA违规=最近7个自然日内每天至少出现1个 sla_overall_met=FALSE 样本
expected_sql:
WITH daily_violation AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, DATE(collect_time) AS d
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days'
    AND sla_overall_met = FALSE
  GROUP BY vpn_id, DATE(collect_time)
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
FROM daily_violation dv
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON dv.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
HAVING COUNT(*) = 7
ORDER BY v.customer_name, v.vpn_name;

question: 计算每台PE设备最近7天的综合健康分：CPU、内存、温度、告警四项各25分，要求输出低于60分的设备。
implicit_knowledge: 设备健康分是自定义规则：CPU<70、内存<75、温度<60、重大+严重告警均值<5 各得25分
expected_sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem,
         AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp,
         AVG(k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count) AS avg_alarm_pressure
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name
)
SELECT ne_name,
       (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_alarm_pressure < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score,
       ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu,
       ROUND(avg_mem, 2) AS avg_mem,
       ROUND(avg_temp, 2) AS avg_temp,
       ROUND(avg_alarm_pressure, 2) AS avg_alarm_pressure
FROM agg
WHERE (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_alarm_pressure < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 60
ORDER BY health_score, ne_name;

question: 找出最近24小时流量增长最快的前10个接口（对比前24小时平均出方向利用率）。
implicit_knowledge: 增长最快=最近24h平均 out_bandwidth_usage_pct - 再前24h平均；这是双时间窗对比模式
expected_sql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT if_id,
         CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
              WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END AS win,
         AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  GROUP BY if_id,
           CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
                WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw, 2) AS current_avg_pct,
       ROUND(pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS previous_avg_pct,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw - pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS growth_pct_point
FROM bucketed cur
JOIN bucketed pre ON cur.if_id = pre.if_id AND cur.win = 'CUR' AND pre.win = 'PRE'
JOIN t_interface i ON cur.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
ORDER BY growth_pct_point DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name
LIMIT 10;

question: 找出那些最新SLA指标已不达标，但其承载隧道最新KPI仍显示sla_violation=FALSE的VPN。
implicit_knowledge: 跨层不一致：业务层SLA不达标，但底层隧道层未报违规；用 associated_vpn_ids 文本包含 vpn_id 近似表示弱关联
expected_sql:
WITH latest_vpn AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
), latest_tunnel AS (
  SELECT tunnel_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY tunnel_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name, sk.sla_overall_met, tk.sla_violation
FROM latest_vpn lv
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON lv.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id AND lv.max_time = sk.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN latest_tunnel lt ON t.tunnel_id = lt.tunnel_id
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON lt.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id AND lt.max_time = tk.collect_time
WHERE sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE AND tk.sla_violation = FALSE
ORDER BY v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name;

question: 找出最近7天路径切换次数最多且同时发生SLA违规的前5条隧道。
implicit_knowledge: 高风险隧道=path_change_count多且 sla_violation=TRUE；按7天累计切换次数排序
expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       SUM(k.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_samples
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY total_path_changes DESC, violation_samples DESC, t.tunnel_name
LIMIT 5;

question: 统计每个区域内PLATINUM业务的平均SLA达标率。
implicit_knowledge: 区域不是VPN直接字段，需从 VPN→PE绑定→设备→站点 推出业务所属区域；按绑定站点区域关联
expected_sql:
WITH region_vpn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_id, s.region
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM'
), hit_rate AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT rv.region, ROUND(AVG(hr.hit_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM region_vpn rv
JOIN hit_rate hr ON rv.vpn_id = hr.vpn_id
GROUP BY rv.region
ORDER BY avg_sla_hit_rate_pct DESC, rv.region;

question: 找出接入协议为EBGP且CE AS号重复出现在多个不同客户VPN中的情况。
implicit_knowledge: CE AS号复用风险：相同 ce_as_number 出现在多个不同 customer_id 的 EBGP 接入记录中
expected_sql:
SELECT b.ce_as_number,
       COUNT(DISTINCT v.customer_id) AS customer_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT b.vpn_id) AS vpn_count
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE b.routing_protocol = 'EBGP' AND b.ce_as_number IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY b.ce_as_number
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT v.customer_id) > 1
ORDER BY customer_count DESC, vpn_count DESC, b.ce_as_number;

question: 查询每个客户在最近30天的平均月化丢包风险，定义为平均丢包率 × 业务月租费。
implicit_knowledge: 月化丢包风险是自定义风险指标：AVG(e2e_packet_loss_pct) * monthly_fee
expected_sql:
SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct * v.monthly_fee), 4) AS loss_fee_risk
FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
ORDER BY loss_fee_risk DESC, v.customer_name;

question: 找出所有同时满足以下条件的PE：启用SRv6、存在LOW_LATENCY Policy、且最近7天平均CPU超过70%。
implicit_knowledge: 复合健康/能力筛选：基础能力来自设备表，策略意图来自 SRv6 Policy，负载来自 NE KPI
expected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_srv6_policy sp ON sp.source_ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
  AND ne.srv6_enabled = TRUE
  AND sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

question: 查询所有使用QINQ封装的VPN接入绑定及其客户信息。
implicit_knowledge: QINQ封装在 binding.encapsulation 字段；客户信息来自 VPN 表
expected_sql:
SELECT b.binding_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_name, b.if_id, b.vlan_id
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE b.encapsulation = 'QINQ'
ORDER BY v.customer_name, b.binding_id;

question: 统计每个站点拥有的设备数量、物理链路端点数量。
implicit_knowledge: 站点设备数来自 t_network_element；链路端点数量等于物理链路中该站点出现在 a_site_id 或 z_site_id 的次数
expected_sql:
WITH site_ne AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS ne_count
  FROM t_network_element
  GROUP BY site_id
), site_link_end AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS link_end_count
  FROM (
    SELECT a_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
    UNION ALL
    SELECT z_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
  ) x
  GROUP BY site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       COALESCE(n.ne_count, 0) AS ne_count,
       COALESCE(l.link_end_count, 0) AS link_end_count
FROM t_site s
LEFT JOIN site_ne n ON s.site_id = n.site_id
LEFT JOIN site_link_end l ON s.site_id = l.site_id
ORDER BY ne_count DESC, link_end_count DESC, s.site_name;

question: 查询每台设备最近一次采集的风扇转速。
implicit_knowledge: 最近一次采集按设备取 MAX(collect_time)；风扇转速字段在 t_ne_perf_kpi.fan_speed_rpm
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT ne_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY ne_id
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, k.fan_speed_rpm, k.collect_time
FROM latest l
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON l.ne_id = k.ne_id AND l.max_time = k.collect_time
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

question: 找出每条物理链路两端属于不同厂商的链路。
implicit_knowledge: 异厂商链路要同时看 A/Z 两端网元的 vendor
expected_sql:
SELECT pl.link_id, pl.link_name, na.vendor AS a_vendor, nz.vendor AS z_vendor
FROM t_physical_link pl
JOIN t_network_element na ON pl.a_ne_id = na.ne_id
JOIN t_network_element nz ON pl.z_ne_id = nz.ne_id
WHERE na.vendor <> nz.vendor
ORDER BY pl.link_id;

question: 查询所有PE-CE之间使用OSPF接入的绑定记录。
implicit_knowledge: PE-CE接入协议看 binding.routing_protocol；不是设备全局 OSPF 状态
expected_sql:
SELECT b.binding_id, v.vpn_name, ne.ne_name, b.if_id, b.routing_protocol
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE b.routing_protocol = 'OSPF'
ORDER BY b.binding_id;

question: 查询所有没有板卡信息的设备。
implicit_knowledge: 没有板卡信息=在 t_board 中不存在 ne_id 记录；是库存完整性检查

question: 找出每个客户名下最贵的VPN月租费。
implicit_knowledge: 最贵业务按 monthly_fee 聚合到客户维度
expected_sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, MAX(monthly_fee) AS max_monthly_fee
FROM t_l3vpn_service
GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
ORDER BY max_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

question: 查询所有同时启用组播和加密的VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 双特性业务→multicast_enabled=TRUE AND encryption_enabled=TRUE
expected_sql:
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, service_level
FROM t_l3vpn_service
WHERE multicast_enabled = TRUE AND encryption_enabled = TRUE
ORDER BY customer_name, vpn_name;

question: 查询所有保护类型为HOT_STANDBY且运行状态为UP的隧道。
implicit_knowledge: 保护类型取自 t_tunnel.protection_type；运行状态看隧道基础表 oper_status
expected_sql:
SELECT tunnel_id, tunnel_name, source_ne_id, dest_ne_id, protection_type
FROM t_tunnel
WHERE protection_type = 'HOT_STANDBY' AND oper_status = 'UP'
ORDER BY tunnel_name;

question: 统计每台设备最近24小时的平均功耗。
implicit_knowledge: 设备功耗观测值在 t_ne_perf_kpi.power_consumption_w；按设备和24小时窗口聚合
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, ROUND(AVG(k.power_consumption_w), 2) AS avg_power_w
FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY avg_power_w DESC, ne.ne_name;

question: 查询最近7天每条隧道的SLA违规率，并找出超过10%的隧道。
implicit_knowledge: 隧道SLA违规率= sla_violation=TRUE 样本数 / 总样本数；并非业务层 VPN SLA
expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 2) AS tunnel_sla_violation_rate_pct
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) > 0.10
ORDER BY tunnel_sla_violation_rate_pct DESC, t.tunnel_name;

question: 找出所有VPN中同一客户跨区域部署的业务。
implicit_knowledge: 跨区域业务=同一 VPN 通过绑定的PE所在站点覆盖多个不同 region
expected_sql:
WITH vpn_region AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.region
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
)
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT region) AS region_count
FROM vpn_region
GROUP BY vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT region) > 1
ORDER BY region_count DESC, customer_name, vpn_name;

question: 查询那些绑定了VRF但VRF当前路由数为0的VPN接入记录。
implicit_knowledge: 配置存在但无路由：binding.vrf_id 关联的 VRF current_route_count=0
expected_sql:
SELECT b.binding_id, v.vpn_name, vr.vrf_name, vr.current_route_count
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_vrf_instance vr ON b.vrf_id = vr.vrf_id
WHERE vr.current_route_count = 0
ORDER BY b.binding_id;

question: 找出每个客户最近30天平均MOS最低的VPN。
implicit_knowledge: MOS仅在业务SLA KPI表；每客户内取平均MOS最低的VPN
expected_sql:
WITH vpn_mos AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, AVG(s.mos_score) AS avg_mos
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY avg_mos ASC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM vpn_mos
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(avg_mos, 2) AS avg_mos
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY avg_mos ASC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

question: 统计每个PE设备承载的ACTIVE VPN总带宽。
implicit_knowledge: 承载VPN总带宽要通过绑定表把 PE 与 VPN 关联，再汇总 VPN.bandwidth_mbps
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name, SUM(v.bandwidth_mbps) AS total_vpn_bandwidth_mbps
FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY total_vpn_bandwidth_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, ne.ne_name;

question: 找出最近7天接口错误包总数最高的前10台设备。
implicit_knowledge: 接口错误包总数=in_error_packets + out_error_packets；按设备聚合后排序
expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       SUM(k.in_error_packets + k.out_error_packets) AS total_error_packets
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY total_error_packets DESC, ne.ne_name
LIMIT 10;

question: 查询没有任何Tunnel承载的SRv6 Policy。
implicit_knowledge: 空闲策略=在 t_tunnel 中不存在 policy_id 关联记录；策略是否被隧道使用是反向关系

question: 查询最近24小时每个区域的平均接口丢弃包数。
implicit_knowledge: 丢弃包数=in_discard_packets + out_discard_packets；区域通过接口KPI→设备→站点
expected_sql:
SELECT s.region,
       ROUND(AVG(k.in_discard_packets + k.out_discard_packets), 2) AS avg_discard_packets
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY s.region
ORDER BY avg_discard_packets DESC, s.region;

question: 找出站点等级为TIER1且拥有至少2台PE的城市。
implicit_knowledge: 核心站点城市定义为 site.tier=TIER1 且该站点内 PE 数>=2；输出城市维度去重
expected_sql:
SELECT s.city, COUNT(DISTINCT ne.ne_id) AS pe_count
FROM t_site s
JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id
WHERE s.tier = 'TIER1' AND ne.role = 'PE'
GROUP BY s.city
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ne.ne_id) >= 2
ORDER BY pe_count DESC, s.city;

question: 查询最近7天每个客户的平均时延和平均抖动，并仅保留GOLD/PLATINUM客户。
implicit_knowledge: 客户性能画像来自 VPN SLA KPI；只保留 service_level 高等级业务
expected_sql:
SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_latency_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_jitter_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_jitter_ms
FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM')
  AND s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC, avg_jitter_ms DESC, v.customer_name;

question: 找出最近30天内至少出现过3次SLA状态切换（达标/不达标变化）的VPN。
implicit_knowledge: SLA状态切换不是现成字段，需要按时间排序比较相邻 sla_overall_met 状态变化次数
expected_sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, collect_time, sla_overall_met,
         LAG(sla_overall_met) OVER (PARTITION BY vpn_id ORDER BY collect_time) AS prev_state
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
), switches AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN prev_state IS NOT NULL AND prev_state <> sla_overall_met THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS switch_count
  FROM ordered
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.switch_count
FROM switches s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.switch_count >= 3
ORDER BY s.switch_count DESC, v.vpn_name;

question: 找出最近7天同时满足高CPU（>80%）且高接口错误（总错误包>1000）的设备。
implicit_knowledge: 跨事实表复合异常：设备KPI 与 接口KPI 同时超阈值，需要分别聚合后再相交
expected_sql:
WITH cpu_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80
), if_error_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING SUM(in_error_packets + out_error_packets) > 1000
)
SELECT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN cpu_hot c ON ne.ne_id = c.ne_id
JOIN if_error_hot e ON ne.ne_id = e.ne_id
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

question: 找出那些最新时延不达标、且其底层承载类型为SRV6_TE的GOLD VPN业务。
implicit_knowledge: 业务筛选=GOLD + underlay_type=SRV6_TE；最新时延不达标看 sla_latency_met=FALSE 的最新样本
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.e2e_latency_avg_ms, v.max_latency_ms
FROM latest l
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi s ON l.vpn_id = s.vpn_id AND l.max_time = s.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND v.underlay_type = 'SRV6_TE'
  AND s.sla_latency_met = FALSE
ORDER BY s.e2e_latency_avg_ms DESC, v.vpn_name;

question: 统计每条SRv6 Policy最近7天关联隧道的平均实测时延，并找出超过Policy约束的策略。
implicit_knowledge: Policy约束与 Tunnel 实测对比：通过 t_tunnel.policy_id 关联，再比较 AVG(measured_latency_ms) 与 sp.max_latency_ms
expected_sql:
SELECT sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name,
       ROUND(AVG(t.measured_latency_ms), 2) AS avg_measured_latency_ms,
       sp.max_latency_ms
FROM t_srv6_policy sp
JOIN t_tunnel t ON sp.policy_id = t.policy_id
WHERE t.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name, sp.max_latency_ms
HAVING AVG(t.measured_latency_ms) > sp.max_latency_ms
ORDER BY avg_measured_latency_ms DESC, sp.policy_name;

question: 找出每个区域中合同金额最高的三个VPN客户（按客户总月租费）。
implicit_knowledge: 客户总月租费=客户下所有VPN monthly_fee 求和；区域通过绑定的PE站点归属推断；区域内Top3用窗口函数
expected_sql:
WITH customer_region_fee AS (
  SELECT s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(v.monthly_fee) AS total_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  GROUP BY s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT region, customer_id, customer_name, total_monthly_fee,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY total_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, customer_id) AS rn
  FROM customer_region_fee
)
SELECT region, customer_id, customer_name, total_monthly_fee
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY region, rn;

question: 找出所有同时满足以下条件的VPN：ACTIVE、合同未到期、最新综合SLA不达标、且最新MOS低于4.0。
implicit_knowledge: 复合经营风险识别：生命周期状态 + 合同状态 + 最新SLA状态 + 体验评分阈值
expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.mos_score, s.sla_overall_met, v.contract_end_date
FROM latest l
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi s ON l.vpn_id = s.vpn_id AND l.max_time = s.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND (v.contract_end_date IS NULL OR v.contract_end_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND s.sla_overall_met = FALSE
  AND s.mos_score < 4.0
ORDER BY s.mos_score, v.vpn_name;

question: 找出最近30天每个客户按平均时延/保证带宽定义的效率最差VPN。
implicit_knowledge: 效率最差不是现成概念：平均时延 ÷ SLA带宽；同客户内取该比值最高的VPN
expected_sql:
WITH vpn_eff AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name,
         AVG(s.e2e_latency_avg_ms) / NULLIF(v.bandwidth_mbps, 0) AS latency_per_mbps
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.bandwidth_mbps IS NOT NULL AND v.bandwidth_mbps > 0
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.bandwidth_mbps
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM vpn_eff
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(latency_per_mbps, 6) AS latency_per_mbps
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

question: 找出最近7天路径切换后仍持续高抖动（平均抖动>10ms）的隧道。
implicit_knowledge: 切换后高抖动= path_change_count>0 且 7天平均 jitter_avg_ms>10；属于时序 + 质量复合条件
expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       SUM(k.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes,
       ROUND(AVG(k.jitter_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_jitter_ms
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
HAVING SUM(k.path_change_count) > 0 AND AVG(k.jitter_avg_ms) > 10
ORDER BY avg_jitter_ms DESC, total_path_changes DESC, t.tunnel_name;

question: 计算每个站点的网络压力指数 = 0.4×平均CPU + 0.3×平均内存 + 0.3×平均接口出方向利用率，并输出前10名。
implicit_knowledge: 网络压力指数是跨事实表的自定义复合指标：设备KPI + 接口KPI，并在站点维度汇总
expected_sql:
WITH ne_site AS (
  SELECT ne_id, site_id FROM t_network_element
), ne_metrics AS (
  SELECT n.site_id,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN ne_site n ON k.ne_id = n.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY n.site_id
), if_metrics AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       ROUND(0.4 * nm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * nm.avg_mem + 0.3 * im.avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index
FROM t_site s
JOIN ne_metrics nm ON s.site_id = nm.site_id

question: 找出最近30天高价值高风险客户：PLATINUM/GOLD业务月租费总和排名前20%，且SLA达标率低于95%。
implicit_knowledge: 高价值高风险是组合经营概念：高价值=高等级业务月租费位于客户前20%；高风险=SLA达标率<95%
expected_sql:
WITH customer_value AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') THEN v.monthly_fee ELSE 0 END) AS premium_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN s.sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
), ranked AS (
  SELECT cv.customer_id, cv.customer_name, cv.premium_monthly_fee, cs.hit_rate,
         NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY cv.premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST) AS value_bucket
  FROM customer_value cv
  JOIN customer_sla cs ON cv.customer_id = cs.customer_id
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, premium_monthly_fee,
       ROUND(hit_rate * 100, 2) AS sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE value_bucket = 1 AND hit_rate < 0.95
ORDER BY premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, sla_hit_rate_pct;
